payload.claim_text: CBDTP tolls will be implemented in three steps, culminating with the rates set in the March 2024 adopted toll structure. Phase 1 (2025, 2026, and 2027) equaling 60% of the corresponding values for the March 2024 adopted toll structure. Phase 2 (2028, 2029, and 2030), the tolls and credits would equal 80%. The March 2024 adopted toll structure values would come into full effect in 2031.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program
